ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "asin" TEXT /* Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) for the product */,
  "helpful_votes" TEXT /* Array of helpful votes for the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Full text of the review */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Time when the review was posted */,
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the review */,
  "unix_review_time" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of the review time */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "review_image_urls" TEXT /* URLs of images attached to the review */,
  "review_video_urls" TEXT /* URLs of videos attached to the review */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., website, mobile app) */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been deleted */,
  "edit_history" TEXT /* History of edits made to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_asin FOREIGN KEY ("asin") REFERENCES products ("asin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "asin" TEXT /* Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the product belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_urls" TEXT /* URLs of product images */,
  "video_urls" TEXT /* URLs of product videos */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the product details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asin")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date the reviewer became a member */,
  "reviewer_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_location" TEXT /* Location of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_social_media" TEXT /* Social media links of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_reviews_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews posted by the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_rating_average" TEXT /* Average rating given by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score from the analysis */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Label indicating the sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords that influenced the sentiment */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment analysis (e.g., NLP, ML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_sentiments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_insights" (
  "insight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insight */,
  "asin" TEXT /* ASIN of the product */,
  "average_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  "most_helpful_review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the most helpful review */,
  "top_positive_reviews" TEXT /* Top positive reviews for the product */,
  "top_negative_reviews" TEXT /* Top negative reviews for the product */,
  "sentiment_trend" TEXT /* Trend of sentiment over time */,
  "review_growth_rate" TEXT /* Rate of review growth over time */,
  "average_helpful_votes" TEXT /* Average number of helpful votes per review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_insights_asin FOREIGN KEY ("asin") REFERENCES products ("asin")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "seller_email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date the seller became a member */,
  "seller_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the seller */,
  "seller_location" TEXT /* Location of the seller */,
  "seller_social_media" TEXT /* Social media links of the seller */,
  "seller_reviews_count" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for all products sold by the seller */,
  "seller_rating_average" TEXT /* Average rating of all products sold by the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seller_products" (
  "seller_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship between a seller and a product */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "asin" TEXT /* ASIN of the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Stock status (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Last time the stock status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seller_products_asin FOREIGN KEY ("asin") REFERENCES products ("asin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seller_products_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., seller, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
